titleStmt.title: SII 41.101: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 101. (A.R. No. 100 of 1905.) Ambāsamudram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the north wall of the Erichcha-Udaiyar shrine in the Ericbchā-Uḍaiyār temple at Ambāsamudram.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land for the expenses of god Thiruppōttuḍaiya Mahādēvar at Rājarājachadurvētimaṅgalam a bhramadēya in Muḷḷi-nāḍu.

The inscription is several pieces, This inscription is dated in the 20th Year of Jaṭāvarmaṉ Śrīvallabha and registers a gift of land for the expenses of the temple of god Thiruppōttuḍaiya-Mahādēvar at Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Muḷḷinadu. the previous tenants of this land were removed and it was named as Nālāyira-viḷāgam and made tax-free from the day Jupitar enter Kumbha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṭan=tayuñ jayamaṭan=tayun=tiruppuyaṅka
ḷil Iṉitiruppa Iru nilamum perumai E
yta Eṇṭicaiyuṅ kuṭai niḻaṟṟa maṉṉa
varellām van=tiṟaiñca marapilema
ṇimuṭicūṭiteṉkumariyumvaṭaka
ṅkaiyun=tiraikkaṭaleellaiyākap pār
muḻutuṅ kayalāṇai parantu ceṅkoluṭaṉ
vaḷara maṉṉiya virasimhāsaṉattu Ulaka muḻutuṭai
yāroṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya mā mutal matikkulam vi
ḷakkiya komutal koccaṭaiya paṉmarāṉa tribhuva
ṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vallava devarkku yāṇṭu 25
vatu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājarājaccarup
peti maṅkalattu tiruppottuṭaiya mahāde
vaṟkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum niman=ta
ṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka kumpaviyāḻa mutal tevatāna I
ṟaiili Iṭṭu Ivvūr nirnilattu Idevar koyili
ṉ teṉpakkamum vaṭapakkamum melpakkamum Aṭaiya
muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻappaṭiyārum brahmadeyamāka
varukiṟa paṭiyun=tavirn=tu Idevaṟku kārāṇmai miyāṭci U
ṭpaṭa nālāyira viḷākameṉṉum piyarāl veṟu
piṟin=ta nilam (1/2)2mā Araiyē Iraṇṭu māviṉāl tarappo
ttakaṅ kāṇāmaiyil puravu nilattopāti māṭai 2 10mukkāl māṭai I
rupate mukkālum kumpaviyāḻa mutal Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamai
Ivai pu
ravari tiṇai
kaḷattu muka
veṭṭi miḻalaikkū
ṟṟamāṉa ke
yaviṉota va
ḷa nāṭṭu kiḷ
kūṟṟattu ve
ḷḷuruṭaiyā
ṉ veṇkāṭaṉ
Āṉapākkaran
Eḻuttu Ivai pu
ravari tiṇaikka
ḷanāyakam mut
tūṟṟu kūṟṟattu māya
lūruṭaiyāṉ
tiruvaṉan=ticaṉ pe
tiruvaṭiyāṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai
śrīvalla
va Uttaraman
tiri Eḻuttu
Ivai vaṭi
vallattiru
kkai Iḷā
ṅkuṭaiyā
ṉ tiruvaṇai
mel niṉṟāṉ
cirāma teva
ṉāṉa Aḻakiya
pāṇṭiya mū
ven=taveḷā
ṉ Eḻuttu I
vai puravari
tiṇaikkaḷa
nāyaka
m miḻalai
kkūṟṟattu
ceyyāṉa
māṉa parākki
rama pāṇṭiya nal
lūr poṉ
paṟṟiyuṭai
yāṉ Araiyaṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai
puravaritiṇaik
kaḷa nāyakam
coḻa maṇṭala
ttu vijayarāja va
ḷa nāṭṭu tevū
r nāṭṭu kāvaṉu
r kāvaṉūr kiḻa
vaṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūr terpo
liya niṉṟāṉ Eḻuttu tuvvūr
kkūṟṟatu kāṭaṅkuṭaiyāṉ
veḷāṉ Ātitta tevaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam
mukaveṭṭi kiḷkuṇṭāṟṟu
nallūruṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ viḻuttarayaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam
tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭu kaṟkuṟicci Uṭaiyāṉ ve
ḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuṭṭu Āṟṟūr periyāṉ
viccātira mūven=taveḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
